  • API Reference
  • dyana.evidence

dyana.evidence#

Evidence extraction modules for DYANA.

class dyana.evidence.EvidenceBundle(timebase, require_canonical=True, tracks=<factory>)[source]#

Bases: object

Order-independent collection of EvidenceTracks on a shared timebase.

Parameters:

  • timebase (dyana.core.timebase.TimeBase) – Bundle timebase. All tracks must match this hop.

  • require_canonical (bool) – If True, enforce that the bundle uses the canonical 10 ms grid.

  • tracks (Dict[str, dyana.evidence.base.EvidenceTrack]) – Optional initial mapping of tracks (by name).

Examples

tb = TimeBase.canonical() bundle = EvidenceBundle(timebase=tb) bundle.add_track(“vad”, vad_track)

static from_directory(path)[source]#

Load a bundle previously written with to_directory().

Parameters:

path (Path)

Return type:

EvidenceBundle

add_track(name, track)[source]#

Add or replace a track by name (mutates bundle).

Parameters:

  • name (str)

  • track (EvidenceTrack)

Return type:

None

get(name, default=None)[source]#

Return a track by name, or default if missing.

Parameters:

  • name (str)

  • default (EvidenceTrack | None)

Return type:

EvidenceTrack | None

items()[source]#
keys()[source]#
merge(other)[source]#

Merge two bundles; tracks in other override duplicates.

Raises:

ValueError – If timebases are incompatible.

Parameters:

other (EvidenceBundle)

Return type:

EvidenceBundle

Examples

merged = b1.merge(b2)

resample_all_to(timebase, *, agg_map=None, default_downsample_agg=None)[source]#

Resample all tracks to timebase. Returns a new bundle.

Parameters:

  • timebase (TimeBase) – Target timebase for all tracks.

  • agg_map (dict[str, Literal['mean', 'max']] | None) – Optional per-track aggregation for downsampling.

  • default_downsample_agg (Literal['mean', 'max'] | None) – Fallback aggregation if a track needs downsampling and is not in agg_map.

Return type:

EvidenceBundle

to_directory(path)[source]#

Serialize bundle to a directory with manifest and per-track NPZ files.

Parameters:

path (Path)

Return type:

None

require_canonical: bool = True#
timebase: TimeBase#
tracks: Dict[str, EvidenceTrack]#
class dyana.evidence.EvidenceTrack(name, timebase, values, semantics, confidence=None, metadata=<factory>)[source]#

Bases: object

Time-aligned soft evidence on a shared TimeBase.

Parameters:

  • name (str) – Track name (e.g., "vad").

  • timebase (dyana.core.timebase.TimeBase) – TimeBase describing hop size and optional frame count.

  • values (numpy.ndarray[tuple[Any, ...], numpy.dtype[numpy.floating]]) – Array of shape (T,) or (T, K). Must be floating, finite.

  • semantics (Literal['probability', 'logit', 'score']) – One of "probability", "score", "logit".

  • confidence (numpy.ndarray[tuple[Any, ...], numpy.dtype[numpy.floating]] | None) – Optional confidence array aligned with values.

  • metadata (Mapping[str, Any]) – Free-form provenance metadata.

Examples

>>> tb = TimeBase.canonical()
>>> T = tb.num_frames(3.0)
>>> vad = EvidenceTrack(
...     name="vad",
...     timebase=tb,
...     values=np.random.rand(T).astype(np.float32),
...     semantics="probability",
...     metadata={"module": "webrtcvad"},
... )
static from_files(name, npz_path, manifest_entry)[source]#

Load an EvidenceTrack from NPZ + manifest entry.

Parameters:

  • name (str)

  • npz_path (Path)

  • manifest_entry (Mapping[str, Any])

Return type:

EvidenceTrack

static from_npz(path)[source]#

Load an EvidenceTrack serialized with to_npz().

Parameters:

path (Path)

Return type:

EvidenceTrack

resample_to(target_timebase, *, agg=None)[source]#

Resample this track onto target_timebase.

Parameters:

  • target_timebase (TimeBase) – Desired timebase. If identical to the current one (hop and optional n_frames), returns self.

  • agg (Literal['mean', 'max'] | None) – Aggregation for downsampling ("mean" or "max"). Required when target_timebase.hop_s is coarser than self.timebase.hop_s.

Return type:

EvidenceTrack

to_canonical(target_timebase=None, *, downsample_agg=None)[source]#

Return an EvidenceTrack on the canonical 10 ms grid.

Parameters:

  • target_timebase (TimeBase | None) – Target timebase (must be canonical). If None, uses global canonical.

  • downsample_agg (Literal['mean', 'max'] | None) – Aggregation to use if downsampling is required ("mean" or "max").

Returns:

Resampled track.

Return type:

EvidenceTrack

Examples

>>> canonical = track.to_canonical(downsample_agg="mean")
to_manifest()[source]#

Return a JSON-serializable manifest entry for this track.

Return type:

Dict[str, Any]

to_npz(path)[source]#

Serialize the track arrays to NPZ.

Parameters:

  • path (Path) – Destination file path. Parent directory must exist.

  • example (Usage)

  • ------------- – track.to_npz(Path(“/tmp/vad.npz”))

Return type:

None

property K: int#

Evidence dimensionality (1 for (T,), else K for (T, K)).

property T: int#

Number of frames.

confidence: ndarray[tuple[Any, ...], dtype[floating]] | None = None#
metadata: Mapping[str, Any]#
name: str#
semantics: Literal['probability', 'logit', 'score']#
timebase: TimeBase#
values: ndarray[tuple[Any, ...], dtype[floating]]#

Modules

base

Base evidence track types and serialization utilities.

bundle

EvidenceBundle container for collections of evidence tracks.

diarization

Lightweight stereo diarization evidence extraction.

energy

leakage

Stereo leakage likelihood evidence (Recipe B1 PoC).

linguistic_hints

Optional linguistic hints evidence (to be implemented).

mic_priors

Microphone and geometry priors (to be implemented).

prosody

Prosodic cue extraction.

separation

Separation and leakage evidence (to be implemented).

stereo

Stereo-derived evidence tracks for channel bias and overlap heuristics.

synthetic

vad

Speech activity evidence extraction via WebRTC VAD.
